flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at Mount Aloysius College fell 23% between 2021 and 2024 (41.0% → 31.5%).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment fell 21% at Mount Aloysius College vs the 2003–2007 baseline (1.1k vs 1.4k).

flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at Mount Aloysius College fell 18% between 2021 and 2024 (68.7% → 56.1%).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Mount Aloysius College rose 13% between 2006 and 2009 ($15.3k → $17.3k).
